table.column: 10565, After all functions are compiled and linked into a single design
1662999 *, After user unroll and inline pragmas are applied
pending, After user array partition and struct aggregate/disaggregate pragmas are applied
, After transformations are applied to meet performance pragma targets

item.name: Instructions per Function for each Compilation Phase

row.col0: repack_stream<nnet::array<ap_fixed<16, 6, AP_TRN, AP_WRAP, 0>, 21>, nnet::array<ap_fixed<16, 6, AP_TRN, AP_WRAP, 0>, 1>, 273>

cast<ap_fixed<16, 6, AP_TRN, AP_WRAP, 0>, ap_fixed<16, 6, AP_TRN, AP_WRAP, 0>, config5_mult>
compute_output_buffer_2d<nnet::array<ap_fixed<16, 6, AP_TRN, AP_WRAP, 0>, 1>, nnet::array<ap_fixed<16, 6, AP_TRN, AP_WRAP, 0>, 24>, config5>

dense_resource<ap_fixed<16, 6, AP_TRN, AP_WRAP, 0>, ap_fixed<16, 6, AP_TRN, AP_WRAP, 0>, config5_mult>

kernel_shift_2d<nnet::array<ap_ufixed<8, 0, AP_RND_CONV, AP_SAT, 0>, 24>, config11>

reduce<ap_fixed<16, 6, AP_TRN, AP_WRAP, 0>, 4, nnet::Op_max<ap_fixed<16, 6, AP_TRN, AP_WRAP, 0> > >
reduce<ap_fixed<16, 6, AP_TRN, AP_WRAP, 0>, 2, nnet::Op_max<ap_fixed<16, 6, AP_TRN, AP_WRAP, 0> > >
shift_line_buffer<nnet::array<ap_ufixed<8, 0, AP_RND_CONV, AP_SAT, 0>, 24>, config11>

note.desc: Exceeded design size warning message threshold

table.column: 100000, Show a warning when total design instructions exceeds this value
